reviews.comment:
Quieren ver la tarjeta física o que me baje la app. No basta con el dni como en todas las estaciones de servicio. No te brindan wifi el el espacio verde, dicen que no funciona

(Translated by Google)
They want to see the physical card or have me download the app. My ID isn't enough, unlike at all other gas stations. They don't offer Wi-Fi in the green space; they say it doesn't work.

reviews.comment:
Si paras aquí nonsoloncargues combustible probá sus sanguches ruteros que no solo son bien cargados y completos sino que están elaborados con excelentes productos de elaboración y frescos.

(Translated by Google)
If you stop here, don't just order fuel, try their roadside sandwiches, which are not only well-loaded and complete but are made with excellent, fresh, and high-quality products.
